headline: S&P Global’s StepForward Ties AI Workforce Push To Long Term Story
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) and the S&P Global Foundation have launched StepForward, a global US$10 million initiative. The program is aimed at preparing young people for an AI enabled workforce through AI education and workforce readiness efforts. StepForward will work through collaborations with partners to deliver training and support talent development in an AI centric economy. headline: Alfreton Capital Sees Opportunity in CCC, Buys 1.98M Shares
summary: This technology firm delivers SaaS and AI-driven workflow solutions for leading players in the property and casualty insurance sector.
